name: ruby-http
title: ruby-http
summary: easy-to-use client library for making http requests from Ruby
description:
easy-to-use client library for making http requests from Ruby
It uses a simple method chaining system for building requests, similar
to Python's Requests
.
Under the hood, The HTTP Gem uses http_parser.rb, a fast HTTP parsing
native extension based on the Node.js parser and a Java port thereof.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-http because easy-to-use client library for making http requests from Ruby.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-http as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-http with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-http --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
